activities_projects.title: Story Recall Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the main idea of the story
steps: Read the story 'The Fun They Had'
Write the names of the two main characters
Write what kind of school they had

activities_projects.title: Character Identification
steps: Write the names Margie and Tommy
Describe one quality of each character
Share the answers in class

activities_projects.title: Future School Drawing
steps: Think about the school shown in the story
Draw a classroom with a mechanical teacher
Label important parts

activities_projects.title: Old vs Future School
steps: Write features of old schools
Write features of Margie's school
Compare both in two columns

activities_projects.title: Word Meaning Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn new vocabulary from the story
steps: Find words like mechanical, attic, telebook
Write their meanings
Use them in simple sentences

activities_projects.title: Sequence the Story
steps: Write key events from the story
Arrange them in the correct order
Check with the textbook

activities_projects.title: Reading Aloud
steps: Read a paragraph from the story
Focus on correct pronunciation
Read it aloud in front of the class

activities_projects.title: Think and Write
steps: Write why Margie hated school
Write why Tommy found the book interesting

activities_projects.title: Creative Writing
steps: Write 5 sentences about your future school
Include technology used in the classroom

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the message of the story
steps: Think about what Margie learned
Write the lesson or moral of the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the theme of the story
